word_page_number.hint: Page numbers are inserted via the Insert tab in Microsoft Word

coupon_issue.hint: Coupons may require a minimum cart value or may have expired

refund_flow.hint: Refunds are usually found under Orders or Account settings

copy_paste.hint: Use Ctrl+C to copy and Ctrl+V to paste. Right-click also shows these options

save_file.hint: Use Ctrl+S to save, or File > Save As for a new location

print_document.hint: Use Ctrl+P to open the print dialog

zoom_in.hint: Use Ctrl+Plus or the View menu to zoom in

find_text.hint: Use Ctrl+F to open the Find dialog in most applications
